title: Strade Bianche gallery: A double dose of Tuscany's stunning white roads
tags: the mayhem of 35 km earlier;Abby Mickey's analysis;Elise Chabbey defies all odds to win Strade BiancheThe Swiss rider outmanoeuvred Kasia Niewiadoma-Phinney and Elisa Longo Borghini in the final corners to take the biggest win of her career (so far).Escape CollectiveAbby Mickey;hype train is gathering speed;Pogačar wins record fourth Strade Bianche, as Seixas delivers with stellar secondThe race for second lasted almost the entire 78 km between Pogačar’s solo move and Siena, with Del Toro hitching a ride to round out the podium.Escape CollectiveKit Nicholson;Subscribe now
